purpose: Controls oil flow to prevent compressor element flooding during startup and shutdown operations

states.name: valve_mechanism_wear
states.description: Valve mechanism health degradation due to mechanical wear and jamming

events.name: valve_jammed
events.description: Oil stop valve stuck preventing proper operation

parameters.name: valve_wear_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for valve mechanism wear degradation

parameters.name: valve_jam_threshold
parameters.description: Valve mechanism wear threshold below which jamming occurs

state_transition_logic: valve_mechanism_wear decreases by (valve_mechanism_wear / valve_wear_timescale) * valve_operation_cycles * dt
event_logic: valve_jammed occurs when valve_mechanism_wear falls below valve_jam_threshold
assumptions: Valve wear is primarily driven by operational cycling rather than continuous operation
Jamming is the primary failure mode when mechanism wear becomes severe
Valve operates in binary open/closed states with no intermediate positioning
Environmental factors like temperature and contamination are captured in the wear rate
